case_title: GERALDINE C ASUNCION VS. RON GRIFFIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-09-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERVED THE DEFENDANT BY CERTIFIED MAIL, BUT NOT DONE THROUGH THE COURT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROPERLY SERVE DEFENDANT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
TRIAL RESET TO APR-10-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MORE TIME TO SERVE TRIAL OF FEB-09-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY ASUNCION, GERALDINE C AS TO DEFENDANT GRIFFIN, RON DBA GRIFFIN REMEDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
